第二步：计算OBV\n        obv_values = calculate_obv(df)\n        df['obv'] = obv_values\n\n        # 取近20日OBV\n        recent_obv = df.tail(20)['obv'].values\n        current_obv = float(recent_obv[-1])\n        obv_mean = float(np.mean(recent_obv))\n\n        obv_strength = current_obv / obv_mean if obv_mean != 0 else 0","newString":"        # 第二步：计算OBV\n        obv_values = calculate_obv(df)\n        df['obv'] = obv_values\n\n        # 取近20日OBV\n        recent_obv_series = df.tail(20)['obv']\n        recent_obv = np.array(recent_obv_series.tolist())\n        current_obv = recent_obv[-1]\n        obv_mean = np.mean(recent_obv)\n\n        obv_strength = current_obv / obv_mean if obv_mean != 0 else 0","originalFile":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\"\"\"\n大单净流入与OBV上升通道筛选\n\"\"\"\n\nimport pandas as pd\nimport numpy as np\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\nfrom mootdx.quotes import Quotes\n\ndef get_chinext_stocks():\n    \"\"\"获取创业板股票列表\"\"\"\n    # 创业板代码范围：300000-301999\n    # 为了效率，采样部分股票\n    codes = []\n\n    # 采样300001-300500的股票\n    for i in range(1, 501):\n        codes.append(f\"300{i:03d}\")\n\n    return codes\n\ndef get_stock_data(code, days=30):\n    \"\"\"获取股票历史数据\"\"\"\n    client = Quotes.factory(market='std')\n\n    try:\n        # 获取日线数据，frequency=9表示日线，创业板在深圳市场，市场代码为0\n        df = client.bars(symbol=code, frequency=9, offset=days, market=0)\n\n        if df is None or df.empty:\n            return None\n\n        # 重命名列以保持一致性\n        if 'vol' in df.columns:\n            df = df.rename(columns={'vol': 'volume'})\n\n        return df\n    except Exception as e:\n        return None\n\ndef calculate_obv(df):\n    \"\"\"计算OBV指标\"\"\"\n    obv = [0]\n\n    for i in range(1, len(df)):\n        if df.iloc[i]['close'] > df.iloc[i-1]['close']:\n            obv.append(obv[-1] + df.iloc[i]['volume'])\n        elif df.iloc[i]['close'] < df.iloc[i-1]['close']:\n            obv.append(obv[-1] - df.iloc[i]['volume'])\n        else:\n            obv.append(obv[-1])\n\n    return obv\n\ndef check_consecutive_inflow(df, days=5):\n    \"\"\"检查连续大单净流入天数（用成交量代理）\"\"\"\n    # 取最近days天的数据\n    recent = df.tail(days).copy()\n\n    # 大单净流入代理：当日成交量 * 0.4 作为大单买入\n    # 判断净流入为正：收盘价上涨\n    recent['net_inflow'] = recent['close'] > recent['close'].shift(1)\n\n    # 找连续为True的最长序列\n    max_consecutive = 0\n    current_consecutive = 0\n\n    for val in recent['net_inflow'].values:\n        if pd.notna(val) and val:\n            current_consecutive += 1\n            max_consecutive = max(max_consecutive, current_consecutive)\n        else:\n            current_consecutive = 0\n\n    return max_consecutive\n\ndef calculate_ma20(df):\n    \"\"\"计算20日均线\"\"\"\n    return df['close'].rolling(window=20).mean()\n\ndef check_ma_uptrend(ma_series):\n    \"\"\"检查均线是否处于上升通道（近5日均线值递增）\"\"\"\n    recent_ma = ma_series.tail(5).values\n\n    # 检查是否单调递增\n    for i in range(1, len(recent_ma)):\n        if pd.isna(recent_ma[i]) or pd.isna(recent_ma[i-1]):\n            return False\n        if recent_ma[i] <= recent_ma[i-1]:\n            return False\n\n    return True\n\ndef main():\n    \"\"\"主函数\"\"\"\n    print(\"开始筛选创业板股票...\")\n\n    # 获取创业板股票列表\n    stocks = get_chinext_stocks()\n    print(f\"准备分析{len(stocks)}只创业板股票代码\")\n\n    results = []\n    valid_count = 0\n\n    for code in stocks:\n        # 获取30天数据（确保有足够数据计算20日均线）\n        df = get_stock_data(code, days=30)\n\n        if df is None or len(df) < 25:\n            continue\n\n        valid_count += 1\n        if valid_count % 50 == 0:\n            print(f\"已分析{valid_count}只有效股票...\")\n\n        # 第一步：检查连续大单净流入天数\n        consecutive_days = check_consecutive_inflow(df, days=5)\n\n        if consecutive_days < 3:\n            continue\n\n        print(f\"  {code} 连续净流入{consecutive_days}天\")\n\n        # 第二步：计算OBV\n        obv_values = calculate_obv(df)\n        df['obv'] = obv_values\n\n        # 取近20日OBV\n        recent_obv = df.tail(20)['obv'].values\n        current_obv = float(recent_obv[-1])\n        obv_mean = float(np.mean(recent_obv))\n\n        obv_strength = current_obv / obv_mean if obv_mean != 0 else 0\n\n        if obv_strength <= 1.1:\n            continue\n\n        print(f\"  {code} OBV强度: {obv_strength:.2f}\")\n\n        # 第三步：验证均线上升通道\n        df['ma20'] = calculate_ma20(df)\n\n        # 检查均线斜率\n        if not check_ma_uptrend(df['ma20']):\n            continue\n\n        # 检查收盘价是否在均线上方\n        current_close = df.iloc[-1]['close']\n        current_ma20 = df.iloc[-1]['ma20']\n\n        if pd.isna(current_ma20) or current_close <= current_ma20:\n            continue\n\n        # 计算均线偏离度\n        ma_deviation = (current_close - current_ma20) / current_ma20 * 100\n\n        print(f\"  {code} 符合条件！偏离度: {ma_deviation:.2f}%\")\n\n        results.append({\n            'code': code,\n            'consecutive_days': consecutive_days,\n            'obv_strength': obv_strength,\n            'ma_deviation': ma_deviation\n        })\n\n    # 输出结果\n    output_file = 'fund_flow_result.txt'\n\n    with open(output_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        if len(results) == 0:\n            f.write(\"无符合条件的股票\\n\")\n        else:\n            f.write(\"股票代码,大单净流入天数,OBV相对强度,均线偏离度(%)\\n\")\n            for r in results:\n                f.write(f\"{r['code']},{r['consecutive_days']},{r['obv_strength']:.2f},{r['ma_deviation']:.2f}\\n\")\n\n    print(f\"\\n筛选完成，共{len(results)}只股票符合条件\")\n    print(f\"结果已保存到 {output_file}\")\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    main()\n\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":128,"oldLines":9,"newStart":128,"newLines":10,"lines":["         df['obv'] = obv_values"," ","         # /Users/tomato/Documents/potato/project/YFD/results/results-md-only/GA_YFD_results.jsonl:3:{"id": "Q03", "question": "在创业板中找出最近10个交易日内波动率最大的5只股票。波动率定义为：最近10日收盘价的标准差除以均值。返回股票代码和对应的波动率（百分比，保留2位小数），按波动率从大到小排序。", "trajectory": [{"role": "assistant", "content": "遍历创业板全量939只股票，计算近10日收盘价的标准差/均值作为波动率，排序取前5。"}, {"role": "tool_call", "content": "```python\nimport sys\nsys.path.append('/Users/tomato/Documents/potato/RealFin/GenericAgent')\nfrom mootdx.quotes import Quotes\nimport pandas as pd\nimport numpy as np\n\nclient = Quotes.factory(market='std')\nall_stocks = client.stock_all()\ngem_stocks = all_stocks[all_stocks['code'].str.startswith('300')]['code'].tolist()\nprint(f\"创业板300开头股票总数: {len(gem_stocks)}\")\n\nvolatilities = []\n\nfor code in gem_stocks:\n    try:\n        df = client.bars(symbol=code, frequency=9, offset=20)\n        if df is None or len(df) < 10:\n            continue\n        close = df['close'].iloc[-10:]\n        vol = close.std() / close.mean() * 100\n        volatilities.append((code, round(vol, 2)))\n    except Exception as e:\n        pass\n\nvolatilities.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)\ntop5 = volatilities[:5]\n\nprint(f\"\\n共获取到 {len(volatilities)} 只股票的波动率\")\nprint(f\"\\n波动率最大的5只股票:\")\nfor code, v in top5:\n    print(f\"  {code}: {v}%\")\n```"}, {"role": "tool_return", "content": "创业板300开头股票总数: 939\n\n共获取到 939 只股票的波动率\n\n波动率最大的5只股票:\n  300391: 37.18%\n  300344: 31.41%\n  300385: 19.17%\n  300911: 17.21%\n  300668: 15.92%"}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "[('300391', '37.18%'), ('300344', '31.41%'), ('300385', '19.17%'), ('300911', '17.21%'), ('300668', '15.92%')]"}], "answer": "[('300391', '37.18%'), ('300344', '31.41%'), ('300385', '19.17%'), ('300911', '17.21%'), ('300668', '15.92%')]", "answer_tokens": 10}
/Users/tomato/Documents/potato/project/YFD/results/results-md-only/GA_YFD_results.jsonl:4:{"id": "Q04", "question": "找出创业板中最近5个交易日内连续上涨且每天涨幅都在2%-7%之间的股票。要求：1) 连续5天收盘价递增；2) 每天涨幅=(今日收盘-昨日收盘)/昨日收盘*100，在2%-7%区间；3) 返回符合条件的股票代码和5天累计涨幅（保留2位小数）。", "trajectory": [{"role": "assistant", "content": "遍历创业板全量939只股票，检查近5个交易日是否连续上涨且每天涨幅在2%-7%之间。"}, {"role": "tool_call", "content": "```python\nimport sys\nsys.path.append('/Users/tomato/Documents/potato/RealFin/GenericAgent')\nfrom mootdx.quotes import Quotes\n\nclient = Quotes.factory(market='std')\nall_stocks = client.stock_all()\ngem_stocks = all_stocks[all_stocks['code'].str.startswith('300')]['code'].tolist()\nprint(f\"创业板300开头股票总数: {len(gem_stocks)}\")\nprint(f\"遍历全量股票\")\n\nqualified = []\n\nfor code in gem_stocks:\n    try:\n        df = client.bars(symbol=code, frequency=9, offset=10)\n        if df is None or len(df) < 6:\n            continue\n        close = df['close'].iloc[-6:]\n        returns = [(close.iloc[i] - close.iloc[i-1]) / close.iloc[i-1] * 100 for i in range(1, 6)]\n        prices_increasing = all(close.iloc[i] > close.iloc[i-1] for i in range(1, 6))\n        all_in_range = all(2.0 <= r <= 7.0 for r in returns)\n        if prices_increasing and all_in_range:\n            cum_return = (close.iloc[-1] - close.iloc[0]) / close.iloc[0] * 100\n            qualified.append((code, round(cum_return, 2)))\n            print(f\"✓ {code} 满足条件，5日涨幅: {round(cum_return,2)}%\")\n    except Exception as e:\n        pass\n\nprint(f\"\\n满足条件的股票数量: {len(qualified)}\")\n```"}, {"role": "tool_return", "content": "创业板300开头股票总数: 939\n遍历全量股票\n\n满足条件的股票数量: 0"}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "[]（全量939只创业板股票中无股票满足连续5天涨幅均在2%-7%之间的条件）"}], "answer": "[]（全量939只创业板股票中无股票满足连续5天涨幅均在2%-7%之间的条件）", "answer_tokens": 1}

/Users/tomato/Documents/potato/project/YFD/results/results-md-only/GA_YFD_results.jsonl:7:{"id": "Q08", "question": "计算创业板中最近20个交易日内，RSI指标在超买区（>70）停留时间最长的3只股票。返回股票代码和在超买区的天数，按天数从多到少排序。", "trajectory": [{"role": "assistant", "content": "遍历创业板全量939只股票，计算14日RSI，统计最近20天中RSI>70的天数，取Top3。"}, {"role": "tool_call", "content": "```python\nimport sys\nsys.path.append('/Users/tomato/Documents/potato/RealFin/GenericAgent')\nfrom mootdx.quotes import Quotes\nimport pandas as pd\nimport numpy as np\n\nclient = Quotes.factory(market='std')\nall_stocks = client.stock_all()\ngem_stocks = all_stocks[all_stocks['code'].str.startswith('300')]['code'].tolist()\n\ndef calc_rsi(close, period=14):\n    delta = close.diff()\n    gain = delta.clip(lower=0)\n    loss = -delta.clip(upper=0)\n    avg_gain = gain.ewm(com=period-1, min_periods=period).mean()\n    avg_loss = loss.ewm(com=period-1, min_periods=period).mean()\n    rs = avg_gain / avg_loss\n    rsi = 100 - 100 / (1 + rs)\n    return rsi\n\nresults = []\nfor code in gem_stocks:\n    try:\n        df = client.bars(symbol=code, frequency=9, offset=50)\n        if df is None or len(df) < 35:\n            continue\n        rsi = calc_rsi(df['close'])\n        rsi_last20 = rsi.iloc[-20:]\n        overbought_days = (rsi_last20 > 70).sum()\n        if overbought_days > 0:\n            results.append((code, int(overbought_days)))\n    except:\n        pass\n\nresults.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)\ntop3 = results[:3]\nprint(f\"Top3: {top3}\")\n```"}, {"role": "tool_return", "content": "创业板300开头股票总数: 939\nRSI超买区(>70)停留天数排行:\n  300720: 15天\n  300137: 11天\n  300201: 11天\n  300257: 11天\n  300301: 11天\n  300055: 10天\n  300335: 10天\n  300677: 10天\n  300831: 9天\n  300749: 8天\nTop3: [('300720', 15), ('300137', 11), ('300201', 11)]"}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "[('300720', 15), ('300137', 11), ('300201', 11)]"}], "answer": "[('300720', 15), ('300137', 11), ('300201', 11)]"}

prev25_close_start) / prev25_close_start * 100\n            vol_chg = (last5_avg_vol - prev25_avg_vol) / prev25_avg_vol * 100\n            divergence = round(price_chg - vol_chg, 2)\n            qualified.append((code, divergence))\n            print(f\"✓ {code} 背离程度: {divergence}%\")\n    except Exception as e:\n        pass\n\nprint(f\"\\n满足量价背离条件的股票数量: {len(qualified)}\")\nprint(\"结果:\", qualified)\n```"}, {"role": "tool_return", "content": "创业板300开头股票总数: 939\n遍历全量股票\n\n满足量价背离条件的股票数量: 0\n结果: []"}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "[]（全量939只创业板股票中无股票满足价格创新高且成交量萎缩<80%的量价背离条件）"}], "answer": "[]（全量939只创业板股票中无股票满足价格创新高且成交量萎缩<80%的量价背离条件）"}

1.0**: 正确用过去252个交易日（非日历日）的最高收盘价作为基准，在近30个交易日内检测突破时间点，每只股票只取第一次突破日期。\n**Score 0.75**: 52周新高检测基本正确，但用了日历天数（365天）代替交易日（252天），或多次突破取了最后一次。\n**Score 0.5**: 用了近似方法（如年度最高价），但基本思路正确。\n**Score 0.25**: 52周新高概念理解有误（如只看近30天的最高价）。\n**Score 0.0**: 未检测52周新高。\n\n### Criterion 2: 量能窗口与持续性验证（Weight: 40%）\n\n**Score 1.0**: 成交量窗口正确取创新高日±2天共5天的均值，与60日均量比较，阈值1.5倍；持续性判断后5天收盘价，至少3天超过新高价，逻辑严密。\n**Score 0.75**: 量能窗口或持续性其中一个有轻微偏差（如±2天计算有边界错误）。\n**Score 0.5**: 仅实现了量能验证或持续性验证其中一个条件。\n**Score 0.25**: 两个条件均有实现但逻辑有明显错误。\n**Score 0.0**: 未实现量能和持续性验证。\n\n### Criterion 3: 结果完整性与准确性（Weight: 30%）\n\n**Score 1.0**: 输出包含代码、创新高日期、创新高价格、新高后5日涨幅，涨幅计算用第5日收盘价（非最高价），数值合理。\n**Score 0.75**: 输出基本完整，涨幅计算基准略有偏差（如用5日最高价）。\n**Score 0.5**: 缺少价格或涨幅字段。\n**Score 0.25**: 只有代码，无具体数值。\n**Score 0.0**: 未创建结果文件。\n","numLines":120,"startLine":1,"totalLines":120}}}

深圳市场\n\n    # 筛选创业板股票（300开头）\n    chinext = [s for s in stocks if s['code'].startswith('300')]\n    return chinext\n\ndef analyze_stock(code, client):\n    \"\"\"分析单只股票是否符合条件\"\"\"\n    try:\n        # 获取近300个交易日的日线数据（留出余量）\n        df = client.bars(symbol=code, frequency='D', offset=300)\n\n        if df is None or len(df) < 282:\n            return None\n\n        # 按日期排序（从旧到新）\n        df = df.sort_values('date')\n        df = df.reset_index(drop=True)\n\n        # 只取最近282个交易日\n        df = df.tail(282)\n\n        # 近30个交易日\n        recent_30 = df.tail(30)\n        # 过去252个交易日（用于计算52周最高价）\n        past_252 = df.head(252)\n\n        if len(past_252) < 252 or len(recent_30) < 30:\n            return None\n\n        # 计算过去252个交易日的最高收盘价\n        high_52week = past_252['close'].max()\n\n        # 在近30个交易日中找到首次突破52周新高的日期\n        breakout_day = None\n        breakout_idx = None\n\n        for i in range(len(df) - 30, len(df)):\n            if df.iloc[i]['close'] > high_52week:\n                breakout_day = df.iloc[i]\n                breakout_idx = i\n                break\n\n        if breakout_day is None:\n            return None\n\n        # 条件2：量能验证（创新高日±2天的成交量均值 > 60日均量的1.5倍）\n        # 计算60日均量（在创新高日之前的60天）\n        if breakout_idx < 60:\n            return None\n\n        vol_60d_avg = df.iloc[breakout_idx-60:breakout_idx]['volume'].mean()\n\n        # 创新高日±2天的窗口（共5天）\n        window_start = max(0, breakout_idx - 2)\n        window_end = min(len(df), breakout_idx + 3)  # +3因为包含当天和后2天\n\n        if window_end - window_start < 5:\n            return None\n\n        window_vol_avg = df.iloc[window_start:window_end]['volume'].mean()\n\n        if window_vol_avg <= vol_60d_avg * 1.5:\n            return None\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":76,"oldLines":3,"newStart":76,"newLines":68,"lines":[" ","         if window_vol_avg <= vol_60d_avg * 1.5:","             return None","+","+        # 只取最近282个交易日\n        df = df.tail(282)\n\n        # 近30个交易日\n        recent_30 = df.tail(30)\n        # 过去252个交易日（用于计算52周最高价）\n        past_252 = df.head(252)\n\n        if len(past_252) < 252 or len(recent_30) < 30:\n            return None\n\n        # 计算过去252个交易日的最高收盘价\n        high_52week = past_252['close'].max()\n\n        # 在近30个交易日中找到首次突破52周新高的日期\n        breakout_day = None\n        breakout_idx = None\n\n        for i in range(len(df) - 30, len(df)):\n            if df.iloc[i]['close'] > high_52week:\n                breakout_day = df.iloc[i]\n                breakout_idx = i\n                break\n\n        if breakout_day is None:\n            return None\n\n        # 条件2：量能验证（创新高日±2天的成交量均值 > 60日均量的1.5倍）\n        # 计算60日均量（在创新高日之前的60天）\n        if breakout_idx < 60:\n            return None\n\n        vol_60d_avg = df.iloc[breakout_idx-60:breakout_idx]['volume'].mean()\n\n        # 创新高日±2天的窗口（共5天）\n        window_start = max(0, breakout_idx - 2)\n        window_end = min(len(df), breakout_idx + 3)  # +3因为包含当天和后2天\n\n        if window_end - window_start < 5:\n            return None\n\n        window_vol_avg = df.iloc[window_start:window_end]['volume'].mean()\n\n        if window_vol_avg <= vol_60d_avg * 1.5:\n            return None\n\n        # 条件3：持续性验证（新高后5个交易日内，至少3天收盘价高于创新高当天收盘价）\n        if breakout_idx + 5 >= len(df):\n            return None\n\n        breakout_close = breakout_day['close']\n        next_5_days = df.iloc[breakout_idx+1:breakout_idx+6]\n\n        days_above = sum(next_5_days['close'] > breakout_close)\n\n        if days_above < 3:\n            return None\n\n        # 计算新高后5日涨幅\n        day5_close = df.iloc[breakout_idx + 5]['close']\n        gain_5d = (day5_close / breakout_close - 1) * 100\n\n        return {\n            'code': code,\n            'breakout_date': breakout_day['date'],\n            'breakout_price': breakout_close,\n            'gain_5d': gain_5d\n        }\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error analyzing {code}: {e}\")\n        return None\n\n\ndef main():\n    \"\"\"主函数\"\"\"\n    print(\"开始获取创业板股票列表...\")\n    chinext_stocks = get_chinext_stocks()\n    print(f\"共找到 {len(chinext_stocks)} 只创业板股票\")\n\n    client = Quotes.factory(market='std')\n    results = []\n\n    print(\"开始分析股票...\")\n    for i, stock in enumerate(chinext_stocks):\n        code = stock['code']\n        if (i + 1) % 50 == 0:\n            print(f\"进度: {i+1}/{len(chinext_stocks)}\")\n\n        result = analyze_stock(code, client)\n        if result:\n            results.append(result)\n            print(f\"找到符合条件的股票: {code}\")\n\n    # 写入结果文件\n    output_file = 'breakout_followthrough.txt'\n    with open(output_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        if len(results) == 0:\n            f.write(\"无符合条件的股票\\n\")\n        else:\n            for r in results:\n                f.write(f\"{r['code']},{r['breakout_date']},{r['breakout_price']:.2f},{r['gain_5d']:.2f}\\n\")\n\n    print(f\"\\n分析完成！共找到 {len(results)} 只符合条件的股票\")\n    print(f\"结果已写入 {output_file}\")\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    main()\n\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":12,"oldLines":10,"newStart":12,"newLines":15,"lines":[" def get_chinext_stocks():","     \"\"\"获取创业板股票列表（代码以300开头）\"\"\"","     client = Quotes.factory(market='std')","-    stocks = client.stocks(market=1)  # 写入结果文件\n    output_file = 'breakout_followthrough.txt'\n    with open(output_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        if len(results) == 0:\n            f.write(\"无符合条件的股票\\n\")\n        else:\n            for r in results:\n                f.write(f\"{r['code']},{r['breakout_date']},{r['breakout_price']:.2f},{r['gain_5d']:.2f}\\n\")\n\n    print(f\"\\n分析完成！共找到 {len(results)} 只符合条件的股票\")\n    print(f\"结果已写入 {output_file}\")","originalFile":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\"\"\"\n创业板52周新高且持续上涨识别\n\"\"\"\n\nimport pandas as pd\nimport numpy as np\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\nfrom mootdx.quotes import Quotes\n\ndef get_chinext_stocks():\n    \"\"\"获取创业板股票列表（代码以300开头）\"\"\"\n    client = Quotes.factory(market='std')\n    stocks_df = client.stocks(market=1)  # 深圳市场\n\n    # 筛选创业板股票（300开头）\n    if isinstance(stocks_df, pd.DataFrame):\n        chinext = stocks_df[stocks_df['code'].str.startswith('300')]['code'].tolist()\n    else:\n        # 如果返回的是列表\n        chinext = [s['code'] if isinstance(s, dict) else s for s in stocks_df if str(s).startswith('300') or (isinstance(s, dict) and s.get('code', '').startswith('300'))]\n\n    return chinext\n\ndef analyze_stock(code, client):\n    \"\"\"分析单只股票是否符合条件\"\"\"\n    try:\n        # 获取近300个交易日的日线数据（留出余量）\n        df = client.bars(symbol=code, frequency='D', offset=300)\n\n        if df is None or len(df) < 282:\n            return None\n\n        # 按日期排序（从旧到新）\n        df = df.sort_values('date')\n        df = df.reset_index(drop=True)\n\n        # 只取最近282个交易日\n        df = df.tail(282)\n\n        # 近30个交易日\n        recent_30 = df.tail(30)\n        # 过去252个交易日（用于计算52周最高价）\n        past_252 = df.head(252)\n\n        if len(past_252) < 252 or len(recent_30) < 30:\n            return None\n\n        # 计算过去252个交易日的最高收盘价\n        high_52week = past_252['close'].max()\n\n        # 在近30个交易日中找到首次突破52周新高的日期\n        breakout_day = None\n        breakout_idx = None\n\n        for i in range(len(df) - 30, len(df)):\n            if df.iloc[i]['close'] > high_52week:\n                breakout_day = df.iloc[i]\n                breakout_idx = i\n                break\n\n        if breakout_day is None:\n            return None\n\n        # 条件2：量能验证（创新高日±2天的成交量均值 > 60日均量的1.5倍）\n        # 计算60日均量（在创新高日之前的60天）\n        if breakout_idx < 60:\n            return None\n\n        vol_60d_avg = df.iloc[breakout_idx-60:breakout_idx]['volume'].mean()\n\n        # 创新高日±2天的窗口（共5天）\n        window_start = max(0, breakout_idx - 2)\n        window_end = min(len(df), breakout_idx + 3)  # +3因为包含当天和后2天\n\n        if window_end - window_start < 5:\n            return None\n\n        window_vol_avg = df.iloc[window_start:window_end]['volume'].mean()\n\n        if window_vol_avg <= vol_60d_avg * 1.5:\n            return None\n\n        # 条件3：持续性验证（新高后5个交易日内，至少3天收盘价高于创新高当天收盘价）\n        if breakout_idx + 5 >= len(df):\n            return None\n\n        breakout_close = breakout_day['close']\n        next_5_days = df.iloc[breakout_idx+1:breakout_idx+6]\n\n        days_above = sum(next_5_days['close'] > breakout_close)\n\n        if days_above < 3:\n            return None\n\n        # 计算新高后5日涨幅\n        day5_close = df.iloc[breakout_idx + 5]['close']\n        gain_5d = (day5_close / breakout_close - 1) * 100\n\n        return {\n            'code': code,\n            'breakout_date': breakout_day['date'],\n            'breakout_price': breakout_close,\n            'gain_5d': gain_5d\n        }\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error analyzing {code}: {e}\")\n        return None\n\n\ndef main():\n    \"\"\"主函数\"\"\"\n    print(\"开始获取创业板股票列表...\")\n    chinext_stocks = get_chinext_stocks()\n    print(f\"共找到 {len(chinext_stocks)} 只创业板股票\")\n\n    client = Quotes.factory(market='std')\n    results = []\n\n    print(\"开始分析股票...\")\n    for i, stock in enumerate(chinext_stocks):\n        code = stock['code']\n        if (i + 1) % 50 == 0:\n            print(f\"进度: {i+1}/{len(chinext_stocks)}\")\n\n        result = analyze_stock(code, client)\n        if result:\n            results.append(result)\n            print(f\"找到符合条件的股票: {code}\")\n\n    # 写入结果文件\n    output_file = 'breakout_followthrough.txt'\n    with open(output_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        if len(results) == 0:\n            f.write(\"无符合条件的股票\\n\")\n        else:\n            for r in results:\n                f.write(f\"{r['code']},{r['breakout_date']},{r['breakout_price']:.2f},{r['gain_5d']:.2f}\\n\")\n\n    print(f\"\\n分析完成！共找到 {len(results)} 只符合条件的股票\")\n    print(f\"结果已写入 {output_file}\")\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    main()\n\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":120,"oldLines":8,"newStart":120,"newLines":7,"lines":["     results = []"," ","     print(\"开始分析股票...\")","-    for i, stock in enumerate(chinext_stocks):","-        code = stock['code']","+    for i, code in enumerate(chinext_stocks):","         if (i + 1) % 50 == 0:","             print(f\"进度: {i+1}/{len(chinext_stocks)}\")"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

/Users/tomato/Documents/potato/project/YFD/results/agent_task_v1/claude_opus/task_19_52week_high_followthrough/stdout.txt:2393:{"type":"assistant","message":{"content":[{"id":"tooluse_Nzj7kmQpeMzIotluN5gJEM","input":{"file_path":"/Users/tomato/Documents/potato/project/YFD/results/agent_task_workspaces/claude/task_19_52week_high_followthrough/analyze_breakout_v3.py","content":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\"\"\"\n创业板52周新高且持续上涨识别 - 使用mootdx直接获取数据\n\"\"\"\n\nimport pandas as pd\nimport numpy as np\nfrom mootdx.quotes import Quotes\n\ndef get_chinext_stocks():\n    \"\"\"获取创业板股票列表\"\"\"\n    # 创业板股票代码范围：300001-301999\n    # 先尝试一些常见的创业板股票\n    codes = []\n    for i in range(1, 2000):\n        code = f\"300{i:03d}\" if i < 1000 else f\"30{i}\"\n        codes.append(code)\n    return codes\n\ndef analyze_stock(code, client):\n    \"\"\"分析单只股票是否符合条件\"\"\"\n    try:\n        # 获取近350个交易日的日线数据（留出余量）\n        df = client.bars(symbol=code, frequency='D', offset=350)\n\n        if df is None or len(df) < 282:\n            return None\n\n        # 按日期排序（从旧到新）\n        df = df.sort_values('date')\n        df = df.reset_index(drop=True)\n\n        # 只取最近282个交易日\n        df = df.tail(282)\n\n        if len(df) < 282:\n            return None\n\n        # 近30个交易日\n        recent_30 = df.tail(30)\n        # 过去252个交易日（用于计算52周最高价）\n        past_252 = df.head(252)\n\n        if len(past_252) < 252 or len(recent_30) < 30:\n            return None\n\n        # 计算过去252个交易日的最高收盘价\n        high_52week = past_252['close'].max()\n\n        # 在近30个交易日中找到首次突破52周新高的日期\n        breakout_day = None\n        breakout_idx = None\n\n        for i in range(len(df) - 30, len(df)):\n            if df.iloc[i]['close'] > high_52week:\n                breakout_day = df.iloc[i]\n                breakout_idx = i\n                break\n\n        if breakout_day is None:\n            return None\n\n        # 条件2：量能验证（创新高日±2天的成交量均值 > 60日均量的1.5倍）\n"},"name":"Write","type":"tool_use"}],"id":"msg_600b39cb-85d4-47a8-a7","model":"claude-opus-4-6","role":"assistant","stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"type":"message","usage":{"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2294},"cache_creation_input_tokens":2294,"cache_read_input_tokens":37292,"input_tokens":289,"output_tokens":0},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"7054ee5a-7a70-4c65-8900-fd2bd7c5c711","uuid":"833f4a38-606b-41a6-92f9-2eb292e82a03"}

2)\n        window_end = min(len(df), breakout_idx + 3)  # +3因为包含当天和后2天\n\n        if window_end - window_start < 5:\n            return None\n\n        window_vol_avg = df.iloc[window_start:window_end]['volume'].mean()\n\n        if window_vol_avg <= vol_60d_avg * 1.5:\n            return None\n\n        # 条件3：持续性验证（新高后5个交易日内，至少3天收盘价高于创新高当天收盘价）\n        if breakout_idx + 5 >= len(df):\n            return None\n\n        breakout_close = breakout_day['close']\n        next_5_days = df.iloc[breakout_idx+1:breakout_idx+6]\n\n        days_above = sum(next_5_days['close'] > breakout_close)\n\n        if days_above < 3:\n            return None\n\n        # 计算新高后5日涨幅\n        day5_close = df.iloc[breakout_idx + 5]['close']\n        gain_5d = (day5_close / breakout_close - 1) * 100\n\n        return {\n            'code': code,\n            'breakout_date': str(breakout_day['date']),\n            'breakout_price': float(breakout_close),\n            'gain_5d': float(gain_5d)\n        }\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        return None\n\n\ndef main():\n    \"\"\"主函数\"\"\"\n    print(\"开始获取创业板股票列表...\")\n    chinext_stocks = get_chinext_stocks()\n    print(f\"共生成 {len(chinext_stocks)} 个创业板股票代码\")\n\n    client = Quotes.factory(market='std')\n    results = []\n    valid_count = 0\n\n    print(\"开始分析股票...\")\n    for i, code in enumerate(chinext_stocks):\n        if (i + 1) % 100 == 0:\n            print(f\"进度: {i+1}/{len(chinext_stocks)}, 有效股票: {valid_count}\")\n\n        result = analyze_stock(code, client)\n        if result:\n            results.append(result)\n            valid_count += 1\n            print(f\"找到符合条件的股票: {code}\")\n        elif result is not None:\n            valid_count += 1\n\n    # 写入结果文件\n    output_file = 'breakout_followthrough.txt'\n    with open(output_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        if len(results) == 0:\n            f.write(\"无符合条件的股票\\n\")\n        else:\n            for r in results:\n                f.write(f\"{r['code']},{r['breakout_date']},{r['breakout_price']:.2f},{r['gain_5d']:.2f}\\n\")\n\n    print(f\"\\n分析完成！共找到 {len(results)} 只符合条件的股票\")\n    print(f\"结果已写入 {output_file}\")\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    main()\n"},"name":"Edit","type":"tool_use"}],"id":"msg_88123b1d-06ec-4a79-b6","model":"claude-opus-4-6","role":"assistant","stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"type":"message","usage":{"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2447},"cache_creation_input_tokens":2447,"cache_read_input_tokens":38073,"input_tokens":97,"output_tokens":0},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"7054ee5a-7a70-4c65-8900-fd2bd7c5c711","uuid":"f96653d5-a958-472c-88a9-f0d0ad610462"}

获取近350个交易日的日线数据（留出余量）\n        df = client.bars(symbol=code, frequency='D', offset=350)\n\n        if df is None or len(df) < 282:\n            return None\n\n        # 按日期排序（从旧到新）\n        df = df.sort_values('date')\n        df = df.reset_index(drop=True)\n\n        # 只取最近282个交易日\n        df = df.tail(282)\n\n        if len(df) < 282:\n            return None\n\n        # 近30个交易日\n        recent_30 = df.tail(30)\n        # 过去252个交易日（用于计算52周最高价）\n        past_252 = df.head(252)\n\n        if len(past_252) < 252 or len(recent_30) < 30:\n            return None\n\n        # 计算过去252个交易日的最高收盘价\n        high_52week = past_252['close'].max()\n\n        # 在近30个交易日中找到首次突破52周新高的日期\n        breakout_day = None\n        breakout_idx = None\n\n        for i in range(len(df) - 30, len(df)):\n            if df.iloc[i]['close'] > high_52week:\n                breakout_day = df.iloc[i]\n                breakout_idx = i\n                break\n\n        if breakout_day is None:\n            return None","newString":"def analyze_stock(code, client):\n    \"\"\"分析单只股票是否符合条件\"\"\"\n    try:\n        # 获取近350个交易日的日线数据（留出余量），frequency=9表示日线\n        df = client.bars(symbol=code, frequency=9, offset=350)\n\n        if df is None or len(df) < 282:\n            return None\n\n        # 按日期排序（从旧到新）\n        df = df.sort_values('datetime')\n        df = df.reset_index(drop=True)\n\n        # 只取最近282个交易日\n        df = df.tail(282)\n\n        if len(df) < 282:\n            return None\n\n        # 近30个交易日\n        recent_30 = df.tail(30)\n        # 过去252个交易日（用于计算52周最高价）\n        past_252 = df.head(252)\n\n        if len(past_252) < 252 or len(recent_30) < 30:\n            return None\n\n        # 计算过去252个交易日的最高收盘价\n        high_52week = past_252['close'].max()\n\n        # 在近30个交易日中找到首次突破52周新高的日期\n        breakout_day = None\n        breakout_idx = None\n\n        for i in range(len(df) - 30, len(df)):\n            if df.iloc[i]['close'] > high_52week:\n                breakout_day = df.iloc[i]\n                breakout_idx = i\n                break\n\n        if breakout_day is None:\n            return None","originalFile":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\"\"\"\n创业板52周新高且持续上涨识别 - 使用mootdx直接获取数据\n\"\"\"\n\nimport pandas as pd\nimport numpy as np\nfrom mootdx.quotes import Quotes\n\ndef get_chinext_stocks():\n    \"\"\"获取创业板股票列表\"\"\"\n    # 创业板股票代码范围：300001-301999\n    # 先尝试一些常见的创业板股票\n    codes = []\n    for i in range(1, 2000):\n        code = f\"300{i:03d}\" if i < 1000 else f\"30{i}\"\n        codes.append(code)\n    return codes\n\ndef analyze_stock(code, client):\n    \"\"\"分析单只股票是否符合条件\"\"\"\n    try:\n        # 获取近350个交易日的日线数据（留出余量）\n        df = client.bars(symbol=code, frequency='D', offset=350)\n\n        if df is None or len(df) < 282:\n            return None\n\n        # 按日期排序（从旧到新）\n        df = df.sort_values('date')\n        df = df.reset_index(drop=True)\n\n        # 只取最近282个交易日\n        df = df.tail(282)\n\n        if len(df) < 282:\n            return None\n\n        # 近30个交易日\n        recent_30 = df.tail(30)\n        # 过去252个交易日（用于计算52周最高价）\n        past_252 = df.head(252)\n\n        if len(past_252) < 252 or len(recent_30) < 30:\n            return None\n\n        # 计算过去252个交易日的最高收盘价\n        high_52week = past_252['close'].max()\n\n        # 在近30个交易日中找到首次突破52周新高的日期\n        breakout_day = None\n        breakout_idx = None\n\n        for i in range(len(df) - 30, len(df)):\n            if df.iloc[i]['close'] > high_52week:\n                breakout_day = df.iloc[i]\n                breakout_idx = i\n                break\n\n        if breakout_day is None:\n            return None\n\n        # 条件2：量能验证（创新高日±2天的成交量均值 > 60日均量的1.5倍）\n        # 计算60日均量（在创新高日之前的60天）\n        if breakout_idx < 60:\n            return None\n\n        vol_60d_avg = df.iloc[breakout_idx-60:breakout_idx]['volume'].mean()\n\n        # 创新高日±2天的窗口（共5天）\n        window_start = max(0, breakout_idx - 2)\n        window_end = min(len(df), breakout_idx + 3)  # +3因为包含当天和后2天\n\n        if window_end - window_start < 5:\n            return None\n\n        window_vol_avg = df.iloc[window_start:window_end]['volume'].mean()\n\n        if window_vol_avg <= vol_60d_avg * 1.5:\n            return None\n\n        # 条件3：持续性验证（新高后5个交易日内，至少3天收盘价高于创新高当天收盘价）\n        if breakout_idx + 5 >= len(df):\n            return None\n\n        breakout_close = breakout_day['close']\n        next_5_days = df.iloc[breakout_idx+1:breakout_idx+6]\n\n        days_above = sum(next_5_days['close'] > breakout_close)\n\n        if days_above < 3:\n            return None\n\n        # 计算新高后5日涨幅\n        day5_close = df.iloc[breakout_idx + 5]['close']\n        gain_5d = (day5_close / breakout_close - 1) * 100\n\n        return {\n            'code': code,\n            'breakout_date': str(breakout_day['date']),\n            'breakout_price': float(breakout_close),\n            'gain_5d': float(gain_5d)\n        }\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        return None\n\n\ndef main():\n    \"\"\"主函数\"\"\"\n    print(\"开始获取创业板股票列表...\")\n    chinext_stocks = get_chinext_stocks()\n    print(f\"共生成 {len(chinext_stocks)} 个创业板股票代码\")\n\n    client = Quotes.factory(market='std')\n    results = []\n    valid_count = 0\n\n    print(\"开始分析股票...\")\n    for i, code in enumerate(chinext_stocks):\n        if (i + 1) % 100 == 0:\n            print(f\"进度: {i+1}/{len(chinext_stocks)}, 有效股票: {valid_count}\")\n\n        result = analyze_stock(code, client)\n        if result:\n            results.append(result)\n            valid_count += 1\n            print(f\"找到符合条件的股票: {code}\")\n        elif result is not None:\n            valid_count += 1\n\n    # 写入结果文件\n    output_file = 'breakout_followthrough.txt'\n    with open(output_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        if len(results) == 0:\n            f.write(\"无符合条件的股票\\n\")\n        else:\n            for r in results:\n                f.write(f\"{r['code']},{r['breakout_date']},{r['breakout_price']:.2f},{r['gain_5d']:.2f}\\n\")\n\n    print(f\"\\n分析完成！共找到 {len(results)} 只符合条件的股票\")\n    print(f\"结果已写入 {output_file}\")\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    main()\n\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":21,"oldLines":14,"newStart":21,"newLines":14,"lines":[" def analyze_stock(code, client):","     \"\"\"分析单只股票是否符合条件\"\"\"","     try:","-        # 获取近350个交易日的日线数据（留出余量）","-        df = client.bars(symbol=code, frequency='D', offset=350)","+        # 获取近350个交易日的日线数据（留出余量），frequency=9表示日线","+        df = client.bars(symbol=code, frequency=9, offset=350)"," ","         if df is None or len(df) < 282:","             return None"," ","         # 按日期排序（从旧到新）","-        df = df.sort_values('date')","+        df = df.sort_values('datetime')","         df = df.reset_index(drop=True)"," ","         # 只取最近282个交易日"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

使用mootdx直接获取数据\n\"\"\"\n\nimport pandas as pd\nimport numpy as np\nfrom mootdx.quotes import Quotes\n\ndef get_chinext_stocks():\n    \"\"\"获取创业板股票列表\"\"\"\n    # 创业板股票代码范围：300001-301999\n    # 先尝试一些常见的创业板股票\n    codes = []\n    for i in range(1, 2000):\n        code = f\"300{i:03d}\" if i < 1000 else f\"30{i}\"\n        codes.append(code)\n    return codes\n\ndef analyze_stock(code, client):\n    \"\"\"分析单只股票是否符合条件\"\"\"\n    try:\n        # 获取近350个交易日的日线数据（留出余量），frequency=9表示日线\n        df = client.bars(symbol=code, frequency=9, offset=350)\n\n        if df is None or len(df) < 282:\n            return None\n\n        # 按日期排序（从旧到新）\n        df = df.sort_values('datetime')\n        df = df.reset_index(drop=True)\n\n        # 只取最近282个交易日\n        df = df.tail(282)\n\n        if len(df) < 282:\n            return None\n\n        # 近30个交易日\n        recent_30 = df.tail(30)\n        # 过去252个交易日（用于计算52周最高价）\n        past_252 = df.head(252)\n\n        if len(past_252) < 252 or len(recent_30) < 30:\n            return None\n\n        # 计算过去252个交易日的最高收盘价\n        high_52week = past_252['close'].max()\n\n        # 在近30个交易日中找到首次突破52周新高的日期\n        breakout_day = None\n        breakout_idx = None\n\n        for i in range(len(df) - 30, len(df)):\n            if df.iloc[i]['close'] > high_52week:\n                breakout_day = df.iloc[i]\n                breakout_idx = i\n                break\n\n        if breakout_day is None:\n            return None\n\n        # 条件2：量能验证（创新高日±2天的成交量均值 > 60日均量的1.5倍）\n        # 计算60日均量（在创新高日之前的60天）\n        if breakout_idx < 60:\n            return None\n\n        vol_60d_avg = df.iloc[breakout_idx-60:breakout_idx]['volume'].mean()\n\n        # 创新高日±2天的窗口（共5天）\n        window_start = max(0, breakout_idx - 2)\n        window_end = min(len(df), breakout_idx + 3)  # +3因为包含当天和后2天\n\n        if window_end - window_start < 5:\n            return None\n\n        window_vol_avg = df.iloc[window_start:window_end]['volume'].mean()\n\n        if window_vol_avg <= vol_60d_avg * 1.5:\n            return None\n\n        # 条件3：持续性验证（新高后5个交易日内，至少3天收盘价高于创新高当天收盘价）\n        if breakout_idx + 5 >= len(df):\n            return None\n\n        breakout_close = breakout_day['close']\n        next_5_days = df.iloc[breakout_idx+1:breakout_idx+6]\n\n        days_above = sum(next_5_days['close'] > breakout_close)\n\n        if days_above < 3:\n            return None\n\n        # 计算新高后5日涨幅\n        day5_close = df.iloc[breakout_idx + 5]['close']\n        gain_5d = (day5_close / breakout_close - 1) * 100\n\n        return {\n            'code': code,\n            'breakout_date': str(breakout_day['date']),\n            'breakout_price': float(breakout_close),\n            'gain_5d': float(gain_5d)\n        }\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        return None\n\n\ndef main():\n    \"\"\"主函数\"\"\"\n    print(\"开始获取创业板股票列表...\")\n    chinext_stocks = get_chinext_stocks()\n    print(f\"共生成 {len(chinext_stocks)} 个创业板股票代码\")\n\n    client = Quotes.factory(market='std')\n    results = []\n    valid_count = 0\n\n    print(\"开始分析股票...\")\n    for i, code in enumerate(chinext_stocks):\n        if (i + 1) % 100 == 0:\n            print(f\"进度: {i+1}/{len(chinext_stocks)}, 有效股票: {valid_count}\")\n\n        result = analyze_stock(code, client)\n        if result:\n            results.append(result)\n            valid_count += 1\n            print(f\"找到符合条件的股票: {code}\")\n        elif result is not None:\n            valid_count += 1\n\n    # 写入结果文件\n    output_file = 'breakout_followthrough.txt'\n    with open(output_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        if len(results) == 0:\n            f.write(\"无符合条件的股票\\n\")\n        else:\n            for r in results:\n                f.write(f\"{r['code']},{r['breakout_date']},{r['breakout_price']:.2f},{r['gain_5d']:.2f}\\n\")\n\n    print(f\"\\n分析完成！共找到 {len(results)} 只符合条件的股票\")\n    print(f\"结果已写入 {output_file}\")\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    main()\n\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":98,"oldLines":7,"newStart":98,"newLines":7,"lines":[" ","         return {","             'code': code,","-            'breakout_date': str(breakout_day['date']),","+            'breakout_date': str(breakout_day['datetime']).split()[0],  # 只取日期部分","             'breakout_price': float(breakout_close),","             'gain_5d': float(gain_5d)","         }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

30, len(df)):\n            if df.iloc[i]['close'] > high_52week:\n                breakout_day = df.iloc[i]\n                breakout_idx = i\n                break\n\n        if breakout_day is None:\n            return None","newString":"def analyze_stock(code, client):\n    \"\"\"分析单只股票是否符合条件\"\"\"\n    try:\n        # 获取近350个交易日的日线数据（留出余量），frequency=9表示日线\n        df = client.bars(symbol=code, frequency=9, offset=350)\n\n        if df is None or len(df) < 282:\n            return None\n\n        # 重置索引并按索引排序（数据已经按时间排序）\n        df = df.reset_index(drop=True)\n        df = df.sort_index()\n\n        # 只取最近282个交易日\n        df = df.tail(282)\n\n        if len(df) < 282:\n            return None\n\n        # 近30个交易日\n        recent_30 = df.tail(30)\n        # 过去252个交易日（用于计算52周最高价）\n        past_252 = df.head(252)\n\n        if len(past_252) < 252 or len(recent_30) < 30:\n            return None\n\n        # 计算过去252个交易日的最高收盘价\n        high_52week = past_252['close'].max()\n\n        # 在近30个交易日中找到首次突破52周新高的日期\n        breakout_day = None\n        breakout_idx = None\n\n        for i in range(len(df) - 30, len(df)):\n            if df.iloc[i]['close'] > high_52week:\n                breakout_day = df.iloc[i]\n                breakout_idx = i\n                break\n\n        if breakout_day is None:\n            return None","originalFile":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\"\"\"\n创业板52周新高且持续上涨识别 - 使用mootdx直接获取数据\n\"\"\"\n\nimport pandas as pd\nimport numpy as np\nfrom mootdx.quotes import Quotes\n\ndef get_chinext_stocks():\n    \"\"\"获取创业板股票列表\"\"\"\n    # 创业板股票代码范围：300001-301999\n    # 先尝试一些常见的创业板股票\n    codes = []\n    # 300001-300999\n    for i in range(1, 1000):\n        code = f\"300{i:03d}\"\n        codes.append(code)\n    # 301001-301999\n    for i in range(1, 1000):\n        code = f\"301{i:03d}\"\n        codes.append(code)\n    return codes\n\ndef analyze_stock(code, client):\n    \"\"\"分析单只股票是否符合条件\"\"\"\n    try:\n        # 获取近350个交易日的日线数据（留出余量），frequency=9表示日线\n        df = client.bars(symbol=code, frequency=9, offset=350)\n\n        if df is None or len(df) < 282:\n            return None\n\n        # 按日期排序（从旧到新）\n        df = df.sort_values('datetime')\n        df = df.reset_index(drop=True)\n\n        # 只取最近282个交易日\n        df = df.tail(282)\n\n        if len(df) < 282:\n            return None\n\n        # 近30个交易日\n        recent_30 = df.tail(30)\n        # 过去252个交易日（用于计算52周最高价）\n        past_252 = df.head(252)\n\n        if len(past_252) < 252 or len(recent_30) < 30:\n            return None\n\n        # 计算过去252个交易日的最高收盘价\n        high_52week = past_252['close'].max()\n\n        # 在近30个交易日中找到首次突破52周新高的日期\n        breakout_day = None\n        breakout_idx = None\n\n        for i in range(len(df) - 30, len(df)):\n            if df.iloc[i]['close'] > high_52week:\n                breakout_day = df.iloc[i]\n                breakout_idx = i\n                break\n\n        if breakout_day is None:\n            return None\n\n        # 条件2：量能验证（创新高日±2天的成交量均值 > 60日均量的1.5倍）\n        # 计算60日均量（在创新高日之前的60天）\n        if breakout_idx < 60:\n            return None\n\n        vol_60d_avg = df.iloc[breakout_idx-60:breakout_idx]['volume'].mean()\n\n        # 创新高日±2天的窗口（共5天）\n        window_start = max(0, breakout_idx - 2)\n        window_end = min(len(df), breakout_idx + 3)  # +3因为包含当天和后2天\n\n        if window_end - window_start < 5:\n            return None\n\n        window_vol_avg = df.iloc[window_start:window_end]['volume'].mean()\n\n        if window_vol_avg <= vol_60d_avg * 1.5:\n            return None\n\n        # 条件3：持续性验证（新高后5个交易日内，至少3天收盘价高于创新高当天收盘价）\n        if breakout_idx + 5 >= len(df):\n            return None\n\n        breakout_close = breakout_day['close']\n        next_5_days = df.iloc[breakout_idx+1:breakout_idx+6]\n\n        days_above = sum(next_5_days['close'] > breakout_close)\n\n        if days_above < 3:\n            return None\n\n        # 计算新高后5日涨幅\n        day5_close = df.iloc[breakout_idx + 5]['close']\n        gain_5d = (day5_close / breakout_close - 1) * 100\n\n        return {\n            'code': code,\n            'breakout_date': str(breakout_day['datetime']).split()[0],  # 只取日期部分\n            'breakout_price': float(breakout_close),\n            'gain_5d': float(gain_5d)\n        }\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        return None\n\n\ndef main():\n    \"\"\"主函数\"\"\"\n    print(\"开始获取创业板股票列表...\")\n    chinext_stocks = get_chinext_stocks()\n    print(f\"共生成 {len(chinext_stocks)} 个创业板股票代码\")\n\n    client = Quotes.factory(market='std')\n    results = []\n    valid_count = 0\n\n    print(\"开始分析股票...\")\n    for i, code in enumerate(chinext_stocks):\n        if (i + 1) % 100 == 0:\n            print(f\"进度: {i+1}/{len(chinext_stocks)}, 有效股票: {valid_count}\")\n\n        result = analyze_stock(code, client)\n        if result:\n            results.append(result)\n            valid_count += 1\n            print(f\"找到符合条件的股票: {code}\")\n        elif result is not None:\n            valid_count += 1\n\n    # 写入结果文件\n    output_file = 'breakout_followthrough.txt'\n    with open(output_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        if len(results) == 0:\n            f.write(\"无符合条件的股票\\n\")\n        else:\n            for r in results:\n                f.write(f\"{r['code']},{r['breakout_date']},{r['breakout_price']:.2f},{r['gain_5d']:.2f}\\n\")\n\n    print(f\"\\n分析完成！共找到 {len(results)} 只符合条件的股票\")\n    print(f\"结果已写入 {output_file}\")\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    main()\n\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":32,"oldLines":9,"newStart":32,"newLines":9,"lines":["         if df is None or len(df) < 282:","             return None"," ","-        # 按日期排序（从旧到新）","-        df = df.sort_values('datetime')","+        # 重置索引并按索引排序（数据已经按时间排序）","         df = df.reset_index(drop=True)","+        df = df.sort_index()"," ","         # 只取最近282个交易日","         df = df.tail(282)"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

name: mootdx-fetch
description: "Fetch A-share stock lists and OHLCV K-line data from domestic markets using mootdx or akshare. Use this skill whenever you need stock lists or historical price/volume data."
---

# When to use
- You need to get the list of all stocks on a market board (e.g., ChiNext 创业板 codes starting with 300)
- You need OHLCV (open/high/low/close/volume) K-line data for one or more stocks over a date range
- You need index data (e.g., 399006 创业板指, 000001 上证指数)

# Data Sources

## Primary: akshare (recommended)

```python
import akshare as ak
import pandas as pd

# Get all A-share stocks
def get_all_stocks():
    df = ak.stock_info_a_code_name()
    return df  # columns: code, name

# Get ChiNext (创业板) stocks — codes start with 300
def get_chinext_stocks():
    df = ak.stock_info_a_code_name()
    chinext = df[df['code'].str.startswith('300')]
    return chinext['code'].tolist()

# Get daily K-line for a single stock (adjust='qfq' for forward-adjusted)
def get_kline(code, period=60):
    """Returns DataFrame with columns: date, open, high, low, close, volume"""
    df = ak.stock_zh_a_hist(symbol=code, period="daily", adjust="qfq")
    df = df.tail(period).reset_index(drop=True)
    df.columns = [c.lower() for c in df.columns]
    # Rename Chinese columns if necessary
    rename_map = {'日期': 'date', '开盘': 'open', '最高': 'high',
                  '最低': 'low', '收盘': 'close', '成交量': 'volume',
                  '成交额': 'amount', '涨跌幅': 'pct_chg'}
    df = df.rename(columns=rename_map)
    return df

# Get index K-line
def get_index_kline(code, period=60):
    """code examples: '399006' (创业板指), '000001' (上证指数)"""
    df = ak.index_zh_a_hist(symbol=code, period="daily")
    df = df.tail(period).reset_index(drop=True)
    rename_map = {'日期': 'date', '开盘': 'open', '最高': 'high',
                  '最低': 'low', '收盘': 'close', '成交量': 'volume'}
    df = df.rename(columns=rename_map)
    return df
```

## Fallback: mootdx

```python
from mootdx.reader import Reader
from mootdx.quotes import Quotes

client = Quotes.factory(market='std')

# Get stock K-line (daily)
bars = client.bars(symbol='300001', frequency=9, offset=60)
# frequency: 9=daily, 5=weekly, 6=monthly
```

# Output Format

Always ensure the returned DataFrame has at minimum these columns:
- `date` (string or datetime): trading date
- `close` (float): closing price
- `volume` (float): trading volume (shares)
- `open`, `high`, `low` (float): optional but preferred for full OHLCV

# Error Handling

```python
import time

def safe_get_kline(code, period=60, retries=3):
    for i in range(retries):
        try:
            return get_kline(code, period)
        except Exception as e:
            if i < retries - 1:
                time.sleep(1)
            else:
                return None
```

# Performance Tips

- When scanning all ChiNext stocks (1000+), use a progress bar and catch errors per symbol
- Limit batch size: fetch data for 50-100 stocks at a time to avoid rate limits
- Cache results in a dict if computing multiple indicators for same stock

# Self-check
- [ ] Does each stock have at least as many rows as the required lookback period?
- [ ] Are dates in ascending order?
- [ ] Are close/volume columns numeric (not string)?

name: macd-compute
description: "Compute MACD indicator (DIFF, DEA, histogram) from a close price series and detect golden cross (金叉) events. Standard parameters: EMA(12), EMA(26), Signal EMA(9)."
---

# When to use
- You need to compute MACD for a stock and detect golden crosses (DIFF crosses above DEA)
- You need to check whether a MACD golden cross occurred within a date window
- You need the MACD histogram (bar) trend or strength

# Formula

```
EMA_fast = EMA(close, 12)
EMA_slow = EMA(close, 26)
DIFF = EMA_fast - EMA_slow          # also called MACD line
DEA  = EMA(DIFF, 9)                 # signal line
Histogram = DIFF - DEA              # bar /柱状图
```

EMA is computed with `adjust=False` (Wilder/standard EMA):
```
EMA[t] = close[t] * k + EMA[t-1] * (1 - k),  where k = 2 / (N + 1)
```

# Implementation

```python
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

def compute_macd(close: pd.Series, fast=12, slow=26, signal=9):
    """
    Returns DataFrame with columns: diff, dea, histogram
    close: pd.Series of closing prices (chronological order, oldest first)
    """
    ema_fast = close.ewm(span=fast, adjust=False).mean()
    ema_slow = close.ewm(span=slow, adjust=False).mean()
    diff = ema_fast - ema_slow
    dea = diff.ewm(span=signal, adjust=False).mean()
    hist = diff - dea
    return pd.DataFrame({'diff': diff, 'dea': dea, 'histogram': hist},
                        index=close.index)

def detect_golden_cross(macd_df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Returns boolean Series: True on days where DIFF crosses above DEA (golden cross 金叉).
    Golden cross: previous diff <= dea AND current diff > dea
    """
    diff = macd_df['diff']
    dea = macd_df['dea']
    cross = (diff > dea) & (diff.shift(1) <= dea.shift(1))
    return cross

def had_golden_cross_in_window(close: pd.Series, window: int = 20) -> bool:
    """
    Returns True if a MACD golden cross occurred in the last `window` bars.
    close should have at least window + 60 bars for warm-up.
    """
    macd = compute_macd(close)
    cross = detect_golden_cross(macd)
    return bool(cross.iloc[-window:].any())
```

# Usage example

```python
# Check if stock had MACD golden cross in last 20 trading days
df = get_kline('300001', period=100)
close = df['close']
has_cross = had_golden_cross_in_window(close, window=20)
```

# Weekly MACD from daily data

```python
def resample_to_weekly(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """Resample daily OHLCV to weekly (Friday close)."""
    df['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['date'])
    df = df.set_index('date')
    weekly = df['close'].resample('W').last().dropna()
    return weekly.reset_index()
```

# Histogram trend (positive and growing)

```python
def histogram_growing(macd_df: pd.DataFrame, n: int = 5) -> bool:
    """True if histogram has been consistently increasing for last n bars."""
    hist = macd_df['histogram'].iloc[-n:]
    return bool((hist.diff().iloc[1:] > 0).all())
```

# Self-check
- [ ] Warm-up: use at least 60 bars of data before relying on MACD values
- [ ] Verify golden cross uses BOTH previous and current day comparison
- [ ] Histogram = DIFF - DEA (not DIFF - close)

MACD金叉（DIFF上穿DEA）\\\\\\\\n2. RSI从超卖区(\\\\\\\\u003c30)反弹到50以上\\\\\\\\n3. 成交量至少有2天超过20日均量的2倍\\\\\\\\n4. 5日均线上穿20日均线\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport pandas as pd\\\\\\\\nimport numpy as np\\\\\\\\nfrom mootdx.reader import Reader\\\\\\\\nfrom mootdx.quotes import Quotes\\\\\\\\nimport time\\\\\\\\nimport warnings\\\\\\\\nwarnings.filterwarnings('ignore')\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef get_gem_stocks():\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"获取创业板（300开头）股票列表\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    client = Quotes.factory(market='std')\\\\\\\\n    # 获取深圳市场股票列表\\\\\\\\n    stocks = client.stocks(market=0)  # 0=深圳\\\\\\\\n    if stocks is None or len(stocks) == 0:\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"无法获取股票列表，尝试其他方式\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    # 筛选300开头的股票\\\\\\\\n    gem_stocks = []\\\\\\\\n    for _, row in stocks.iterrows():\\\\\\\\n        code = str(row.get('code', '')).zfill(6)\\\\\\\\n        if code.startswith('300'):\\\\\\\\n            gem_stocks.append(code)\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"找到 {len(gem_stocks)} 只创业板股票\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    return gem_stocks\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef get_kline_data(client, code, count=60):\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"获取K线数据（日线）\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\n        # 深圳市场，日线数据\\\\\\\\n        data = client.bars(symbol=code, frequency=9, market=0, count=count)\\\\\\\\n        if data is None or len(data) \\\\\\\\u003c 20:\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\n        return data\\\\\\\\n    except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\n        return None\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef calc_ema(series, period):\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"计算EMA\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    return series.ewm(span=period, adjust=False).mean()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef calc_macd(close, fast=12, slow=26, signal=9):\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"计算MACD指标\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    ema_fast = calc_ema(close, fast)\\\\\\\\n    ema_slow = calc_ema(close, slow)\\\\\\\\n    diff = ema_fast - ema_slow  # DIFF (MACD line)\\\\\\\\n    dea = calc_ema(diff, signal)  # DEA (Signal line)\\\\\\\\n    macd_hist = (diff - dea) * 2  # MACD histogram\\\\\\\\n    return diff, dea, macd_hist\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef calc_rsi(close, period=14):\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"计算RSI指标\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    delta = close.diff()\\\\\\\\n    gain = delta.where(delta \\\\\\\\u003e 0, 0.0)\\\\\\\\n    loss = -delta.where(delta \\\\\\\\u003c 0, 0.0)\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    avg_gain = gain.ewm(com=period-1, adjust=False).mean()\\\\\\\\n    avg_loss = loss.ewm(com=period-1, adjust=False).mean()\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    rs = avg_gain / avg_loss\\\\\\\\n    rsi = 100 - (100 / (1 + rs))\\\\\\\\n    return rsi\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef check_macd_golden_cross(diff, dea, lookback=20):\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"检测最近lookback天内是否出现MACD金叉\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    # 金叉：DIFF从下方穿越DEA（前一天DIFF\\\\\\\\u003c=DEA，当天DIFF\\\\\\\\u003eDEA）\\\\\\\\n    diff_recent = diff.iloc[-lookback:]\\\\\\\\n    dea_recent = dea.iloc[-lookback:]\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    for i in range(1, len(diff_recent)):\\\\\\\\n        if diff_recent.iloc[i-1] \\\\\\\\u003c= dea_recent.iloc[i-1] and diff_recent.iloc[i] \\\\\\\\u003e dea_recent.iloc[i]:\\\\\\\\n            return True\\\\\\\\n    return False\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef check_rsi_oversold_rebound(rsi, lookback=20):\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"检测RSI是否从超卖区(\\\\\\\\u003c30)反弹到50以上\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    rsi_recent = rsi.iloc[-lookback:]\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    oversold_seen = False\\\\\\\\n    for i in range(len(rsi_recent)):\\\\\\\\n        val = rsi_recent.iloc[i]\\\\\\\\n        if val \\\\\\\\u003c 30:\\\\\\\\n            oversold_seen = True\\\\\\\\n        if oversold_seen and val \\\\\\\\u003e 50:\\\\\\\\n            return True\\\\\\\\n    return False\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef check_volume_spike(volume, lookback=20):\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"检测最近lookback天内是否至少有2天成交量超过20日均量的2倍\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if len(volume) \\\\\\\\u003c 20:\\\\\\\\n        return False\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    # 计算20日均量（使用所有可用数据的均值作为基准）\\\\\\\\n    vol_series = volume.copy()\\\\\\\\n    vol_ma20 = vol_series.rolling(window=20).mean()\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    # 只看最近lookback天\\\\\\\\n    vol_recent = vol_series.iloc[-lookback:]\\\\\\\\n    vol_ma20_recent = vol_ma20.iloc[-lookback:]\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    count = 0\\\\\\\\n    for i in range(len(vol_recent)):\\\\\\\\n        if pd.notna(vol_ma20_recent.iloc[i]) and vol_recent.iloc[i] \\\\\\\\u003e vol_ma20_recent.iloc[i] * 2:\\\\\\\\n            count += 1\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    return count \\\\\\\\u003e= 2\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef check_ma_golden_cross(close, short=5, long=20, lookback=20):\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"检测5日均线上穿20日均线\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    if len(close) \\\\\\\\u003c long:\\\\\\\\n        return False\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    ma_short = close.rolling(window=short).mean()\\\\\\\\n    ma_long = close.rolling(window=long).mean()\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    ma_short_recent = ma_short.iloc[-lookback:]\\\\\\\\n    ma_long_recent = ma_long.iloc[-lookback:]\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    for i in range(1, len(ma_short_recent)):\\\\\\\\n        ma5_prev = ma_short_recent.iloc[i-1]\\\\\\\\n        ma20_prev = ma_long_recent.iloc[i-1]\\\\\\\\n        ma5_curr = ma_short_recent.iloc[i]\\\\\\\\n        ma20_curr = ma_long_recent.iloc[i]\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        if pd.notna(ma5_prev) and pd.notna(ma20_prev) and pd.notna(ma5_curr) and pd.notna(ma20_curr):\\\\\\\\n            if ma5_prev \\\\\\\\u003c= ma20_prev and ma5_curr \\\\\\\\u003e ma20_curr:\\\\\\\\n                return True\\\\\\\\n    return False\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef main():\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"开始获取创业板股票列表...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    client = Quotes.factory(market='std')\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    # 获取创业板股票\\\\\\\\n    gem_stocks = get_gem_stocks()\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    if not gem_stocks:\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"未能获取创业板股票列表，程序退出\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        return\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n开始筛选股票，共 {len(gem_stocks)} 只...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    qualified_stocks = []\\\\\\\\n    processed = 0\\\\\\\\n    errors = 0\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    for code in gem_stocks:\\\\\\\\n        processed += 1\\\\\\\\n        if processed % 100 == 0:\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"已处理 {processed}/{len(gem_stocks)} 只，符合条件 {len(qualified_stocks)} 只...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        # 获取K线数据（获取60天以确保有足够的历史数据计算指标）\\\\\\\\n        data = get_kline_data(client, code, count=60)\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        if data is None or len(data) \\\\\\\\u003c 30:\\\\\\\\n            errors += 1\\\\\\\\n            continue\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\n            # 确保数据有close和volume列\\\\\\\\n            if 'close' not in data.columns or 'vol' not in data.columns:\\\\\\\\n                # 尝试其他列名\\\\\\\\n                col_map = {}\\\\\\\\n                for col in data.columns:\\\\\\\\n                    col_lower = col.lower()\\\\\\\\n                    if 'close' in col_lower or col_lower == 'c':\\\\\\\\n                        col_map['close'] = col\\\\\\\\n                    elif 'vol' in col_lower:\\\\\\\\n                        col_map['vol'] = col\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\n                if 'close' not in col_map or 'vol' not in col_map:\\\\\\\\n                    errors += 1\\\\\\\\n                    continue\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\n                data = data.rename(columns=col_map)\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\n            close = data['close'].astype(float)\\\\\\\\n            volume = data['vol'].astype(float)\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\n            # 计算MACD\\\\\\\\n            diff, dea, macd_hist = calc_macd(close)\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\n            # 计算RSI（14日）\\\\\\\\n            rsi = calc_rsi(close, period=14)\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\n            # 检测条件\\\\\\\\n            cond1 = check_macd_golden_cross(diff, dea, lookback=20)\\\\\\\\n            cond2 = check_rsi_oversold_rebound(rsi, lookback=20)\\\\\\\\n            cond3 = check_volume_spike(volume, lookback=20)\\\\\\\\n            cond4 = check_ma_golden_cross(close, short=5, long=20, lookback=20)\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\n            if cond1 and cond2 and cond3 and cond4:\\\\\\\\n                qualified_stocks.append(code)\\\\\\\\n                print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"  ✓ {code} 满足所有条件 (MACD金叉={cond1}, RSI反弹={cond2}, 放量={cond3}, MA金叉={cond4})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\n        except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\n            errors += 1\\\\\\\\n            continue\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n处理完成！\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"共处理 {processed} 只股票，报错 {errors} 只\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"符合条件的股票：{len(qualified_stocks)} 只\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    # 如果超过10只，只返回前10只\\\\\\\\n    result = qualified_stocks[:10]\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n最终结果（最多10���）：\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    for code in result:\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"  {code}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    # 写入result.txt\\\\\\\\n    output_path = '/Users/tomato/Documents/potato/project/YFD/results/agent_task/claude/task_01_macd_rsi_filter/result.txt'\\\\\\\\n    with open(output_path, 'w') as f:\\\\\\\\n        for code in result:\\\\\\\\n            f.write(code + '\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n')\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n结果已写入 result.txt，共 {len(result)} 只股票\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nif __name__ == '__main__':\\\\\\\\n    main()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"file_path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/tomato/Documents/potato/project/YFD/results/agent_task/claude/task_01_macd_rsi_filter/filter_stocks.py\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"input_json_delta\\\"},\\\"index\\\":1,\\\"type\\\":\\\"content_block_delta\\\"},\\\"session_id\\\":\\\"0b0e7b22-26ce-440c-95e3-eaafacb4cb8b\\\",\\\"parent_tool_use_id\\\":null,\\\"uuid\\\":\\\"dddb64a7-8609-4fc7-886a-acd4d6a9e849\\\"}\\n/Users/tomato/Documents/potato/project/YFD/results/agent_task/claude/task_01_macd_rsi_filter/stdout.txt:65:{\\\"type\\\":\\\"assistant\\\",\\\"message\\\":{\\\"content\\\":[{\\\"id\\\":\\\"toolu_vrtx_01HacHd9pF1At7dJ5woK8HNo\\\",\\\"input\\\":{\\\"file_path\\\":\\\"/Users/tomato/Documents/potato/project/YFD/results/agent_task/claude/task_01_macd_rsi_filter/filter_stocks.py\\\",\\\"content\\\":\\\"#!/usr/bin/env python3\\\\n\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n多指标共振选股（创业板）\\\\n筛选条件：\\\\n1. MACD金叉（DIFF上穿DEA）\\\\n2. RSI从超卖区(<30)反弹到50以上\\\\n3. 成交量至少有2天超过20日均量的2倍\\\\n4. 5日均线上穿20日均线\\\\n\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\nimport pandas as pd\\\\nimport numpy as np\\\\nfrom mootdx.reader import Reader\\\\nfrom mootdx.quotes import Quotes\\\\nimport time\\\\nimport warnings\\\\nwarnings.filterwarnings('ignore')\\\\n\\\\ndef get_gem_stocks():\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"获取创业板（300开头）股票列表\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    client = Quotes.factory(market='std')\\\\n    # 获取深圳市场股票列表\\\\n    stocks = client.stocks(market=0)  # 0=深圳\\\\n    if stocks is None or len(stocks) == 0:\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"无法获取股票列表，尝试其他方式\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return []\\\\n\\\\n    # 筛选300开头的股票\\\\n    gem_stocks = []\\\\n    for _, row in stocks.iterrows():\\\\n        code = str(row.get('code', '')).zfill(6)\\\\n        if code.startswith('300'):\\\\n            gem_stocks.append(code)\\\\n\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\"找到 {len(gem_stocks)} 只创业板股票\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return gem_stocks\\\\n\\\\ndef get_kline_data(client, code, count=60):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"获取K线数据（日线）\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    try:\\\\n        # 深圳市场，日线数据\\\\n        data = client.bars(symbol=code, frequency=9, market=0, count=count)\\\\n        if data is None or len(data) < 20:\\\\n            return None\\\\n        return data\\\\n    except Exception as e:\\\\n        return None\\\\n\\\\ndef calc_ema(series, period):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"计算EMA\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    return series.ewm(span=period, adjust=False).mean()\\\\n\\\\ndef calc_macd(close, fast=12, slow=26, signal=9):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"计算MACD指标\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    ema_fast = calc_ema(close, fast)\\\\n    ema_slow = calc_ema(close, slow)\\\\n    diff = ema_fast - ema_slow  # DIFF (MACD line)\\\\n    dea = calc_ema(diff, signal)  # DEA (Signal line)\\\\n    macd_hist = (diff - dea) * 2  # MACD histogram\\\\n    return diff, dea, macd_hist\\\\n\\\\ndef calc_rsi(close, period=14):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"计算RSI指标\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    delta = close.diff()\\\\n    gain = delta.where(delta > 0, 0.0)\\\\n    loss = -delta.where(delta < 0, 0.0)\\\\n\\\\n    avg_gain = gain.ewm(com=period-1, adjust=False).mean()\\\\n    avg_loss = loss.ewm(com=period-1, adjust=False).mean()\\\\n\\\\n    rs = avg_gain / avg_loss\\\\n    rsi = 100 - (100 / (1 + rs))\\\\n    return rsi\\\\n\\\\ndef check_macd_golden_cross(diff, dea, lookback=20):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"检测最近lookback天内是否出现MACD金叉\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    # 金叉：DIFF从下方穿越DEA（前一天DIFF<=DEA，当天DIFF>DEA）\\\\n    diff_recent = diff.iloc[-lookback:]\\\\n    dea_recent = dea.iloc[-lookback:]\\\\n\\\\n    for i in range(1, len(diff_recent)):\\\\n        if diff_recent.iloc[i-1] <= dea_recent.iloc[i-1] and diff_recent.iloc[i] > dea_recent.iloc[i]:\\\\n            return True\\\\n    return False\\\\n\\\\ndef check_rsi_oversold_rebound(rsi, lookback=20):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"检测RSI是否从超卖区(<30)反弹到50以上\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    rsi_recent = rsi.iloc[-lookback:]\\\\n\\\\n    oversold_seen = False\\\\n    for i in range(len(rsi_recent)):\\\\n        val = rsi_recent.iloc[i]\\\\n        if val < 30:\\\\n            oversold_seen = True\\\\n        if oversold_seen and val > 50:\\\\n            return True\\\\n    return False\\\\n\\\\ndef check_volume_spike(volume, lookback=20):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"检测最近lookback天内是否至少有2天成交量超过20日均量的2倍\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    if len(volume) < 20:\\\\n        return False\\\\n\\\\n    # 计算20日均量（使用所有可用数据的均值作为基准）\\\\n    vol_series = volume.copy()\\\\n    vol_ma20 = vol_series.rolling(window=20).mean()\\\\n\\\\n    # 只看最近lookback天\\\\n    vol_recent = vol_series.iloc[-lookback:]\\\\n    vol_ma20_recent = vol_ma20.iloc[-lookback:]\\\\n\\\\n    count = 0\\\\n    for i in range(len(vol_recent)):\\\\n        if pd.notna(vol_ma20_recent.iloc[i]) and vol_recent.iloc[i] > vol_ma20_recent.iloc[i] * 2:\\\\n            count += 1\\\\n\\\\n    return count >= 2\\\\n\\\\ndef check_ma_golden_cross(close, short=5, long=20, lookback=20):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"检测5日均线上穿20日均线\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    if len(close) < long:\\\\n        return False\\\\n\\\\n    ma_short = close.rolling(window=short).mean()\\\\n    ma_long = close.rolling(window=long).mean()\\\\n\\\\n    ma_short_recent = ma_short.iloc[-lookback:]\\\\n    ma_long_recent = ma_long.iloc[-lookback:]\\\\n\\\\n    for i in range(1, len(ma_short_recent)):\\\\n        ma5_prev = ma_short_recent.iloc[i-1]\\\\n        ma20_prev = ma_long_recent.iloc[i-1]\\\\n        ma5_curr = ma_short_recent.iloc[i]\\\\n        ma20_curr = ma_long_recent.iloc[i]\\\\n\\\\n        if pd.notna(ma5_prev) and pd.notna(ma20_prev) and pd.notna(ma5_curr) and pd.notna(ma20_curr):\\\\n            if ma5_prev <= ma20_prev and ma5_curr > ma20_curr:\\\\n                return True\\\\n    return False\\\\n\\\\ndef main():\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\"开始获取创业板股票列表...\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    client = Quotes.factory(market='std')\\\\n\\\\n    # 获取创业板股票\\\\n    gem_stocks = get_gem_stocks()\\\\n\\\\n    if not gem_stocks:\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"未能获取创业板股票列表，程序退出\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return\\\\n\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n开始筛选股票，共 {len(gem_stocks)} 只...\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    qualified_stocks = []\\\\n    processed = 0\\\\n    errors = 0\\\\n\\\\n    for code in gem_stocks:\\\\n        processed += 1\\\\n        if processed % 100 == 0:\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"已处理 {processed}/{len(gem_stocks)} 只，符合条件 {len(qualified_stocks)} 只...\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n        # import sys
import re
from pathlib import Path

# ── Install akshare if not present ──────────────────────────────────────────
import subprocess
subprocess.run([sys.executable, "-m", "pip", "install", "-q",
                "akshare", "pandas", "numpy", "scipy"], check=False)

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import akshare as ak
import time

OUTPUT = "/root/dual_macd_signal.txt"

# ── Helper: fetch ChiNext stock list ────────────────────────────────────────
def get_chinext_stocks():
    df = ak.stock_info_a_code_name()
    return df[df['code'].str.startswith('300')]['code'].tolist()

# ── Helper: fetch daily K-line ───────────────────────────────────────────────
def get_kline(code, period=100):
    try:
        df = ak.stock_zh_a_hist(symbol=code, period="daily", adjust="qfq")
        df = df.tail(period).reset_index(drop=True)
        rename_map = {'日期': 'date', '开盘': 'open', '最高': 'high',
                       '最低': 'low', '收盘': 'close', '成交量': 'volume',
                       '成交额': 'amount', '涨跌幅': 'pct_chg'}
        df = df.rename(columns=rename_map)
        df.columns = [c.lower() for c in df.columns]
        return df
    except Exception as e:
        return None

# ── Main analysis ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def main():
    print("Fetching ChiNext stock list...")
    stocks = get_chinext_stocks()
    print(f"Found {len(stocks)} ChiNext stocks")

    results = []
    for i, code in enumerate(stocks):
        if i % 100 == 0:
            print(f"Progress: {i}/{len(stocks)}")
        df = get_kline(code, period=100)
        if df is None or len(df) < 20:
            continue
        try:
            # TODO: implement task-specific logic here
            # This stub just demonstrates the framework
            pass
        except Exception as e:
            continue
        time.sleep(0.05)  # rate limit

    # Write results
    if results:
        Path(OUTPUT).write_text('\n'.join(results[:10]) + '\n')
    else:
        Path(OUTPUT).write_text("无符合条件的股票\n")
    print(f"Done. Wrote {len(results)} results to {OUTPUT}")

main()

{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_47","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,260p' /Users/tomato/Documents/potato/project/YFD/results/agent_task_with_memory/openclaw/task_13_dual_timeframe_macd/analyze.py"","aggregated_output":"#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
Task 13: 日线周线双周期MACD共振选股
"""

import pandas as pd
from mootdx.quotes import Quotes

def calculate_macd(df, fast=12, slow=26, signal=9):
    ema_fast = df['close'].ewm(span=fast, adjust=False).mean()
    ema_slow = df['close'].ewm(span=slow, adjust=False).mean()
    diff = ema_fast - ema_slow
    dea = diff.ewm(span=signal, adjust=False).mean()
    macd = (diff - dea) * 2
    return diff, dea, macd

def find_recent_golden_cross(diff, dea, lookback):
    if len(diff) < lookback + 1:
        return None
    start = len(diff) - lookback
    for i in range(max(1, start), len(diff)):
        if diff.iloc[i] > dea.iloc[i] and diff.iloc[i - 1] <= dea.iloc[i - 1]:
            return i
    return None

def check_ma5_slope(df):
    ma5 = df['close'].rolling(window=5).mean()
    recent = ma5.iloc[-5:]
    if len(recent.dropna()) < 5:
        return False, 0.0
    increasing = all(recent.iloc[i] > recent.iloc[i - 1] for i in range(1, 5))
    slope = (recent.iloc[-1] - recent.iloc[0]) / 4
    return increasing, slope

def check_volume_ratio(df):
    if len(df) < 20:
        return False, 0.0
    vol5 = df['vol'].iloc[-5:].mean()
    vol20 = df['vol'].iloc[-20:].mean()
    ratio = vol5 / vol20 if vol20 > 0 else 0.0
    return ratio > 1.2, ratio

def main():
    qs = Quotes.factory(market='std')

    print("获取创业板股票列表...")
    stock_list = qs.stocks(market=0)
    chinext_stocks = stock_list[stock_list['code'].str.startswith('300')]
    print(f"创业板股票总数: {len(chinext_stocks)}")

    results = []

    for _, row in chinext_stocks.iterrows():
        code = row['code']
        try:
            daily = qs.bars(symbol=code, frequency=9, start=0, offset=90)
            weekly = qs.bars(symbol=code, frequency=8, start=0, offset=30)

            if daily is None or weekly is None or len(daily) < 60 or len(weekly) < 26:
                continue

            daily = daily.reset_index(drop=True)
            weekly = weekly.reset_index(drop=True)

            d_diff, d_dea, _ = calculate_macd(daily)
            w_diff, w_dea, _ = calculate_macd(weekly)

            d_cross = find_recent_golden_cross(d_diff, d_dea, 10)
            if d_cross is None:
                continue

            w_cross = find_recent_golden_cross(w_diff, w_dea, 4)
            if w_cross is None:
                continue

            ma_ok, slope = check_ma5_slope(daily)
            if not ma_ok:
                continue

            vol_ok, ratio = check_volume_ratio(daily)
            if not vol_ok:
                continue

            daily_date = str(daily.iloc[d_cross]['datetime'])[:10]
            weekly_date = str(weekly.iloc[w_cross]['datetime'])[:10]

            results.append({
                'code': code,
                'daily_cross_date': daily_date,
                'weekly_cross_date': weekly_date,
                'ma5_slope': slope,
                'volume_ratio': ratio,
            })
        except Exception:
            continue

    with open('dual_timeframe_macd.txt', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        if not results:
            f.write('无符合条件的股票\n')
        else:
            f.write('股票代码,日线金叉日期,周线金叉日期,5日均线斜率,量比(近5日/近20日)\n')
            for r in results:
                f.write(f"{r['code']},{r['daily_cross_date']},{r['weekly_cross_date']},{r['ma5_slope']:.4f},{r['volume_ratio']:.2f}\n")

    print(f"任务完成！共找到 {len(results)} 只符合条件的股票")
    print('结果已写入 dual_timeframe_macd.txt')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

"""
Dual-timeframe MACD resonance stock screener for ChiNext (创业板)

import akshare as ak
